supersedes: every Generation B pilot verdict reached on raw activation cosine, and the first correction pass that centred by the held-out teacher mean

instrument_defects_found.defect: raw activation cosine used as a promotion metric on a mean-dominated target
instrument_defects_found.consequence: candidates scoring 0.87 were reported as partial fidelity while losing to a constant whose own raw cosine is 0.83 to 0.90

instrument_defects_found.defect: the first correction centred by the teacher's own mean, a statistic of the held-out target
instrument_defects_found.consequence: the null was handed information the candidate should have had to earn; centred numbers from that pass are void
instrument_defects_found.status: SUPERSEDED, recomputed against a fit-split null

functional.the_map_is_the_win_not_the_nonlinearity: the full linear control reaches 0.5441 against the student's 0.5318; the random features buy 6x fewer bytes for 2 percent less skill

residual_stream.measured_on: layers 38 to 41, teacher weights, real attention and real router

runtime.before: expert weight traffic at 51.64 GB per token
runtime.after: attention and protected organs at 29.9 GB per token against 0.96 GB of functional payload

causal_statement: On GLM-5.2, a cheap function of the hidden state predicts a layer's MoE output far better than any representation of that layer's expert weights, and does so at a seventieth of the rate. It still does not produce a model, because this architecture's residual stream amplifies every perturbation it is given, and amplifies small ones hardest.
question_handed_forward: what is the per-layer amplification spectrum of the target architecture, and does any architecture have a contractive regime a functional student can live inside
not_evidence_of: capability, full-model quality, or behaviour. Bounded calibration batches of 4096 held-out positions from a sealed corpus; the token-level number is a 1024-row logit-lens probe rather than the model's head.
